videos.title: Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo books spot in sprint classic final | Winter Olympics 2026 | NBC Sports
videos.description:
Norwegian cross-country skiing legend Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo cruises to first place in the second semifinal of the men's sprint classic. American JC Schoonmaker finished in fourth, missing out on the final. #NBCSports #WinterOlympics #Skiing

videos.title: Wolfdog jumps into Olympic XC ski race, goes for gold | Winter Olympics 2026 | NBC Sports
videos.description:
In the women’s cross-country skiing team sprint qualification, a dog ran onto the course and zoomed with two skiers across the finish line. The good boy's sprint was caught by the photo finish camera. #NBCSports #WinterOlympics #CrossCountrySkiing
